```sh
grep -r 'DASHSCOPE_API_KEY=[A-Za-z0-9]{32}' .
grep -r 'OPENAI_API_KEY=[A-Za-z0-9]{40}' .
```

- The current security scan pattern is ineffective at detecting real API keys.
- There is a risk of accidental exposure of secrets if the scan does not work as intended.
